title: Escape tool-package install card bpk token

source.subject: fix(pckg): escape `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install card

body:
## What shipped

Escapes the `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install cards so Razor/Blazor does not treat `@` as code.

## Source commit

Repository **`pckg`** · commit `135f7c9`

> fix(pckg): escape `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install card

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
